member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext
member.summary: Source-generated JsonSerializerContext for AOT trimming/performance and consistent camelCase handling. Mirrors the pattern used in ProjectFulcrum Contracts/Messages. All hand-coded ToJson/FromJson methods in this library prefer this context.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Boolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableBoolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.ByteArray
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Double
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableDouble
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.ClaimPath
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdCredential
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdErrorCode
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdException
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DigitalIdRequestOptions
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DictionaryStringObject
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.IReadOnlyListClaimPath
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.IReadOnlyListString
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.DateTimeOffset
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableDateTimeOffset
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Int32
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.NullableInt32
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Object
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: T:DigitalId.ClaimPath
member.summary: Represents a path to a specific claim inside a digital credential (mdoc style). Matches the Dart ClaimPath shape exactly for interoperability.

member.name: M:DigitalId.ClaimPath.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded serialization (no reflection-heavy generators at runtime). Produces camelCase JSON matching the Flutter/Dart side exactly.

member.name: M:DigitalId.ClaimPath.ToMap
member.summary: Map form using the same camelCase keys as Dart toMap().

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential
member.summary: The result of a successful digital identity presentation. Contains both structured fields (for immediate frontend use) and the raw cryptographic proof (for backend validation). Hand-coded serialization + attributes produce exact camelCase + base64/ISO shape matching Flutter/Dart.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.GivenName
member.summary: Given name (first name) as disclosed by the credential.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.FamilyName
member.summary: Family name (last name) as disclosed by the credential.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.FullName
member.summary: Full name as disclosed (if provided by issuer).

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.DateOfBirth
member.summary: Date of birth.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.BirthDate
member.summary: Raw birth date string (ISO format if present).

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.AgeOver18
member.summary: Whether the holder is over 18 (if disclosed).

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.AgeOver21
member.summary: Whether the holder is over 21 (if disclosed).

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.AllDisclosedClaims
member.summary: Raw map of every claim that was actually disclosed.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.RawCredential
member.summary: The full verifiable presentation / encrypted blob / mdoc device response. This is what must be sent to your backend for validation.

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded serialization (no source generators at runtime). Produces exact camelCase + base64/ISO matching the Dart toJson()/toMap().

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdCredential.ToMap
member.summary: Produces a map with exact camelCase keys and base64/ISO values matching Dart toMap().

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdException
member.summary: Represents an error that occurred during a digital identity request or verification.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdException.Code
member.summary: The machine-readable error code.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdException.Message
member.summary: Human-readable description of the error.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdException.Details
member.summary: Additional diagnostic details (if any).

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdException.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded JSON matching Dart DigitalIdException.toJson() shape.

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode
member.summary: Error codes matching the Dart DigitalIdErrorCode enum.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode.NotAvailable
member.summary: No digital ID of the requested type is available on this device/platform.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode.UserCancelled
member.summary: The user explicitly cancelled the identity presentation.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode.NotEntitled
member.summary: The app is not entitled (Apple) or not registered as a relying party (Google) for this feature.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode.NoCredential
member.summary: No matching credential was found for the request.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode.PlatformUnsupported
member.summary: The current platform or OS version does not support digital identity presentment.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdErrorCode.Unknown
member.summary: An unexpected or unknown error occurred.

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions
member.summary: Controls what data is requested from a digital identity document (selective disclosure). Matches Dart DigitalIdRequestOptions exactly for cross-platform use.

member.name: P:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions.PlatformOptions
member.summary: Platform-specific escape hatch (advanced use only).

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions.ToJson
member.summary: Hand-coded serialization producing camelCase JSON matching Flutter toJson().

member.name: M:DigitalId.DigitalIdRequestOptions.ToMap
member.summary: Map using exact camelCase keys from Dart toMap().

member.name: T:DigitalId.DigitalIdType
member.summary: The type of government-issued digital identity document.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.Passport
member.summary: Passport or passport-derived Digital ID.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.EuDigitalId
member.summary: EU Digital Identity / eIDAS PID or national eID.

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.DriversLicense
member.summary: Driver's license or mobile Driver's License (mDL).

member.name: F:DigitalId.DigitalIdType.AgeVerificationOnly
member.summary: Special mode for age verification only (minimal disclosure).

member.name: T:DigitalId.Requests.DigitalIdRequestBuilder
member.summary: Builds OpenID4VP / DCQL requests from the cross-platform options.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Apple.AppleResponseDecryptor
member.summary: Decrypts Apple "encrypted" identity responses returned by PassKit Verify with Wallet.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Cose.CoseSign1
member.summary: Represents a decoded COSE_Sign1 structure.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Cose.CoseSign1.Verify(Org.BouncyCastle.Crypto.ISigner,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies the signature using the provided BouncyCastle signer. The signer must already be initialized with the public key.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Cose.CoseSign1.BuildSigStructure(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Builds the Sig_structure exactly as specified in RFC 8152 / RFC 9052.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.DigitalIdVerifier
member.summary: Production-capable verification for mdoc and digital credentials. Real COSE validation is now performed when proper keys are provided.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.DigitalIdVerifier.LoadIssuerPublicKeyFromPem(System.String)
member.summary:
Loads a BouncyCastle public key from a PEM string (certificate or public key).
Production use: Load your trusted IACA issuer certificates this way and pass the resulting AsymmetricKeyParameter to VerifyMdoc / MdocVerifier.Verify.
How to obtain real certificates: - Development / simulator: Use the "Sample data and simulator keys" bundle from Apple’s mDL docs. - Production: Contact each issuing authority (state DMV, national eID provider, etc.) for their current signing certificate. Maintain an allow-list of trusted issuers in your backend configuration. There is no single universal live global API (issuers are sovereign); lists are maintained per-jurisdiction or through regional trust frameworks (e.g. EU eIDAS trusted lists, AAMVA resources for US mDL). Fetching live without strong pinning and signature verification on the list itself is not recommended.
US Passport Digital ID (Apple "passport-digital-id"): • Dev/simulator: https://developer.apple.com/bug-reporting/profiles-and-logs/ then https://developer.apple.com/wallet/get-started-with-verify-with-wallet/ • Production: Privately distributed by Apple to approved RPs after entitlement approval.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocParser
member.summary: Production-grade parser for mdoc ISO 18013-5 DeviceResponse. Extracts IssuerAuth (COSE_Sign1 containing MSO), DeviceAuth, issuerNameSpaces (disclosed claims), and parses the Mobile Security Object (MSO) for digest validation.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocParser.ParseDeviceResponse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Parses a DeviceResponse CBOR into a rich MdocDocument with MSO and disclosed namespaces extracted.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocParser.ParseMso(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Parses the Mobile Security Object (MSO) CBOR payload.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocParser.ValidateDigests(DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument)
member.summary: Validates that every disclosed element in issuerNameSpaces has a matching digest entry in the MSO valueDigests. This is the critical security check that the issuer actually signed/authored the exact disclosed claim values.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocMso
member.summary: Parsed Mobile Security Object from the IssuerAuth COSE payload.

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument
member.summary: Rich document structure with all pieces needed for full cryptographic validation.

member.name: P:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument.IssuerAuth
member.summary: Raw COSE_Sign1 bytes for the issuer authorization (contains the MSO).

member.name: P:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument.DeviceAuth
member.summary: Device authentication structure (deviceSignature or deviceMac).

member.name: P:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument.IssuerNameSpaces
member.summary: Disclosed name spaces and values (the actual claims).

member.name: P:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument.Mso
member.summary: Parsed Mobile Security Object.

member.name: P:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocDocument.MsoBytes
member.summary: Raw bytes of the MSO (for digest verification).

member.name: T:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocVerifier
member.summary: Production-oriented mdoc verifier (ISO 18013-5). Performs real COSE cryptographic validation (Sign1 for issuer + device auth) + critical MSO digest validation proving the issuer authorized the exact disclosed claim values.

member.name: M:DigitalId.Verification.Mdoc.MdocVerifier.Verify(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Byte[],Org.BouncyCastle.Crypto.AsymmetricKeyParameter,Org.BouncyCastle.Crypto.AsymmetricKeyParameter)
member.summary: Verifies a device response (mdoc) using optional device public key (for transcript binding) and/or issuer public key (for MSO signature + digest validation).
